mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system_configs
AND config_group = #{configGroup}

SELECT id, config_key AS configKey, config_name AS configName, config_value AS configValue, config_type AS configType, config_group AS configGroup, description, sort_order AS sortOrder, editable, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM system_configs WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, config_key AS configKey, config_name AS configName, config_value AS configValue, config_type AS configType, config_group AS configGroup, description, sort_order AS sortOrder, editable, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM system_configs WHERE config_key = #{configKey}

SELECT id, config_key AS configKey, config_name AS configName, config_value AS configValue, config_type AS configType, config_group AS configGroup, description, sort_order AS sortOrder, editable, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM system_configs WHERE config_group = #{configGroup} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system_configs WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_configs (config_key, config_name, config_value, config_type, config_group, description, sort_order, status, created_at) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configName}, #{configValue}, #{configType}, #{configGroup}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE system_configs SET config_name = #{configName}, config_value = #{configValue}, config_type = #{configType}, config_group = #{configGroup}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE system_configs SET config_value = #{configValue}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
